_notes.position: World origin [0, 28, 0] — matches CYLINDER_Y = 28 from RootSpace.js. Camera rests at Y=2 inside the cylinder interior.
_notes.geometry: CylinderGeometry declares the Root as a cylindrical space node. RootSpace.js owns the actual Three.js mesh construction (outer r=38, middle r=30, inner r=22, height=260). This schema entry is the logical identity record, not the geometry factory call.
_notes.primitive: objective — the Root is the origin axiom. Confirmed, deterministic, the foundational premise. Color #ffffff matches PRIMITIVE_COLORS.objective in OmniNode.
_notes.parentId: null — Root has no parent. It is the top of every logic tree.
_notes.rootId: null — Root nodes reference themselves as their own root. null is the sentinel value OmniInspector displays as '—' when no rootId is set, which is correct for the Root node.
_notes.stationary: The Root is always stationary — it cannot be moved by the user. This constraint is enforced at the application level (NodeLoader sets mesh.userData.stationary = true) rather than in this schema, since the Shape 1 flat format does not include a stationary field.
_notes.NodeLoader: NodeLoader.js parses this file and calls OmniNode._createNode(data) or its equivalent bootstrap path. It does NOT call the full PLACE flow — the Root is pre-placed, not user-placed.
_notes.depth: depth = 0. Not stored in this record — NodeManager computes depth dynamically from the edge graph. For the Root, NodeManager._tree will assign depth 0.
